message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "Admin\nSAV Manager\nSAV Technician\nScooter Owner" as Actor
boundary "verifyEmail" as verifyEmail
control "VerificationController" as VerificationController
entity "User" as User

Actor -> verifyEmail : FillVerifyEmailForm(email,token)
verifyEmail ..> Actor : FormFilled

verifyEmail -> verifyEmail : VerifyVerifyEmailForm(email,token)
verifyEmail ..> verifyEmail : FormVerified

alt [FormVerified is true]
    verifyEmail -> VerificationController : verifyUser(email,code)
    VerificationController -> User : verifyUser(email,code)
    User ..> VerificationController : user enabled
    VerificationController ..> verifyEmail : user enabled
    verifyEmail ..> Actor : user enabled
else [FormVerified is false]
    verifyEmail ..> Actor : showErrorMessage
end

@enduml
```
